programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Andrew and Leah are the coolest, quirky couple in Eagle Rock. While they love their Spanish-style home, the kitchen is out of place in the worst way. With a small budget and big dreams, Ellen will have to get really creative to please this couple.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Laura and James have four kids and one on the way! They have a tiny kitchen with the cooking output of a busy restaurant! Ellen adores this family and is determined to give them more than they could have ever hoped.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Stephanie and John are back; this time, the makeover's headed outside; with the second baby on the way and a toddler who's asleep by seven, indoor cooking is off-limits; they need Ellen to transform their sad patio into a pizza paradise!

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Barrie and Morgan are new homeowners and expecting parents; Barrie runs a catering business from home, but with bad storage, a leaky stove hood and no flow, her creativity's stalling and she's eyeing a rental kitchen to cope; can Ellen save it?

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Kandis is a home baker with a booming gluten-free business, but her tiny, chaotic kitchen is crumbling under pressure.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Vlad and Olga's cramped condo kitchen is straining their marriage; he wants function, she wants minimalism and DIY fixes only cause fights.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Meredith juggles two kids, gluten-free cooking and full-time mom life; Dan works 70+ hours for the LA Rams; with a lack of space, disorganised supplies and mounting tension, she asks Ellen to transform her chaotic kitchen into a calm space.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Noelle, a designer at Hedley and Bennett, with her husband Tim, love to cook; their small kitchen has killed the joy; with awkward cabinets, lost appliances and no counter space they need Ellen to bring order and fun back to their family's room.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Gustavo and Carissa's dream kitchen has become a nightmare; Gustavo and Carissa need Ellen to fix their disjointed kitchen before baby Marlow starts crawling!

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Culinary event producer Caryl Chinn's 1970s kitchen is a design disaster, embarrassing her during tastings with top chefs; it has broken appliances, wasted space and clutter everywhere.

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: The competition intensifies as teams head into their lake houses to transform their primary bedrooms and bathrooms; comfort and creativity take center stage as they showcase their vision and skill; while out on the lake, Scott and Bryan come up with a bold twist that pushes each duo even further out of their comfort zone; poor planning sends some teams scrambling towards risky shortcuts, and ambitious ideas spark clashes that threaten timelines.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.sub-title: Toy Plane, Film Projector, Camping Kitchen
programme.desc: Nigel Havers presides as sellers come face to face with five dealers who battle it out to make the highest bid.

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: The competition intensifies as teams head into their lake houses to transform their primary bedrooms and bathrooms; comfort and creativity take center stage as they showcase their vision and skill; while out on the lake, Scott and Bryan come up with a bold twist that pushes each duo even further out of their comfort zone; poor planning sends some teams scrambling towards risky shortcuts, and ambitious ideas spark clashes that threaten timelines.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.sub-title: Toy Plane, Film Projector, Camping Kitchen
programme.desc: Nigel Havers presides as sellers come face to face with five dealers who battle it out to make the highest bid.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Lisa is a passionate home chef who loves to cook for her family; the last space they have yet to address in their home is the old-school galley kitchen; Ellen will have to get creative to turn this kitchen disaster into the heart of the home.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Nominated by their daughter Brittany, Susan and Brad have lived in their craftsman for over 30 years; Susan doesn't think her tiny kitchen needs a glow up, so Ellen will have to convince her that change is sometimes a good thing.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Natalie just bought her own home in LA. It's perfect with just enough space, but she wants to extend the kitchen and improve the functionality and organization! Ellen will have to transform this tiny box of a kitchen into an entirely new space.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Kat is a cool, trendy gal with a passion for cooking that has led her to an incredibly successful career as restaurateur and a chef! The pressure is on Ellen in this episode as Kat is a friend and nothing but the best will do.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Margaret & Keith are former high school friends who fell for each other later in life and settled into a beautiful old Spanish influenced home. The Hunts have some serious ambition for their dated kitchen and it may be more than Ellen can handle.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Stephanie is a new mom that finds joy in cooking because of the memories she made in India growing up. Now, she is determined to pass those memories on. Ellen knows Stephanie is a super fan and is determined not to let her down.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Andrew and Leah are the coolest, quirky couple in Eagle Rock. While they love their Spanish-style home, the kitchen is out of place in the worst way. With a small budget and big dreams, Ellen will have to get really creative to please this couple.

programme.title: Kitchen Glow Up
programme.desc: Laura and James have four kids and one on the way! They have a tiny kitchen with the cooking output of a busy restaurant! Ellen adores this family and is determined to give them more than they could have ever hoped.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: David and Jane love their home's mountain location and the active lifestyle is allows them to have, but Jane can't find enough reasons to stay.

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: Chris is elated to buy his childhood home from his parents, but Stephanie feels as though she's stuck in a time warp.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: Todd looks for a turnkey home on the West Side to persuade Chris to move; Jillian tries to redesign the couple's dysfunctional home to convince Eva to stay.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Love It or List It Vancouver
programme.desc: Ellie and Davey are deciding to update their current home with a view or move downtown.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: The competition intensifies as teams head into their lake houses to transform their primary bedrooms and bathrooms; comfort and creativity take center stage as they showcase their vision and skill; while out on the lake, Scott and Bryan come up with a bold twist that pushes each duo even further out of their comfort zone; poor planning sends some teams scrambling towards risky shortcuts, and ambitious ideas spark clashes that threaten timelines.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple decides to move back to their roots in Laurel, Miss.; they're looking for a home with a big lot for outdoor living; Ben and Erin show them a rancher that fits their love of modern rustic design and a home with an enticing in-ground pool.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A family moves to Laurel, Miss., to escape cold Canadian winters, and are looking for big rooms and plenty of outdoor space for four boys; Ben and Erin present a rural bungalow on a huge piece of land and a home with a backyard bonus feature.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Jones College has a special place in Ben and Erin's hearts; they are asked to restore The Old President's House; it's a team effort as students, past and present, step in to help make this house feel less institutional and more like a home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin's favorite odd couple, an aunt and her great niece, look for their mutual dream home, but they don't agree on anything; Ben and Erin show them two homes; Erin has her work cut out for her determining the color story for this contrary pair.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple recently inherited a house that belonged to her parents, and they currently live in the home next door, so they need to decide which one they'll keep and renovate; there are strong feelings for both places.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A couple with an appreciation for character homes is looking for something unique with an outdoor kitchen and a pottery studio; Ben and Erin present a more traditional home set across from a park and a ranch-style house with a garden room.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: A single mom, who grew up in New York, wants to give her two kids a cozy place, like the one she grew up in; Ben and Erin present a home with a huge fireplace, that instantly gives warmth, and a house on two acres that evokes childhood memories.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Ben and Erin help the City of Laurel and the Laurel Housing Authority to convert a historic building into Laurel's first Visitor's Center; they also take on the restoration of a 1940s public housing unit as part of the exhibit.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Cambridgeshire couple Martin and Val Parry want to retire to Mar Menor in Southern Spain, where they hope its saltwater lagoon might help Martin's osteoarthritis.

programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott and Bryan head out for their annual fishing showdown; teams dive into their kitchens and dining areas; unexpected storage challenges test their creativity and with the clock ticking, temperatures rise between teammates; unexpected obstacles force teams to make tough decisions, and mounting setbacks threaten to derail even the strongest plans; guest judge Debra Salmoni steps in to help determine who brought the heat in the kitchen.

programme.title: Love It or List It UK
programme.desc: Jacqueline and Renee are at loggerheads over their extended six-bed home in Stockport; after a previous renovation didn't solve their issues, Renee is ready to list; but Jacqueline believes that the house can work, if only Kirstie can convince Renee.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: Newlyweds are looking to be closer to her family and his flight school, so they relocate from Idaho to Arizona; he dreams of a large fixer that he and her brother can work on together, but she wants something smaller that's move-in ready.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.sub-title: Mom and Daughter Dilemma in LA
programme.desc: A single mom wants to set a good example for her kids and looks to buy a home in Los Angeles; they need more space, and finding something in her price range in the market is tough, especially when her 18-year-old daughter is pushing her own agenda.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Scott and Bryan head out for their annual fishing showdown; teams dive into their kitchens and dining areas; unexpected storage challenges test their creativity and with the clock ticking, temperatures rise between teammates; unexpected obstacles force teams to make tough decisions, and mounting setbacks threaten to derail even the strongest plans; guest judge Debra Salmoni steps in to help determine who brought the heat in the kitchen.

programme.desc: Dan and Heather are debating on moving; he's tired of the long commute; she's not ready to move and give up on their home.

programme.desc: Calvin and Mary need a home with more space for Mary's at-home business.
